case_title: SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY VS. OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NAD DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY CO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY MS:DEBBIE TRIUNFOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY MS:DEBBIE TRIUNFOL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
